display.purpose: Hero and project detail titles only.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Collapse transitions and scroll behavior for reduced-motion users.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for project navigation, contact, and resume flows.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.75rem 1.1rem; background: var(--color-accent-ink); color: var(--color-white); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: var(--color-ink); color: var(--color-white); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-button-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action with a quiet border and amber wash hover.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid var(--color-line); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.75rem 1.1rem; background: var(--color-white); color: var(--color-ink); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); line-height: 1; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent); background: var(--color-accent-soft); color: var(--color-ink); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-button-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Skill Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0.42rem 0.65rem; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); line-height: 1; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Evidence card for a featured project from the Astro content collection.
components.html:
En desarrolloAnalisis, UX/UI y desarrollo web

CoffeeRank TJ

Plataforma web para descubrir y resenar cafeterias locales.

PHPMySQLCSS
Ver caso de estudio
components.css: .ds-project-card { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-line); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); background: var(--color-white); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 1.5rem; font-family: var(--font-body); } .ds-project-card h3 { margin: 0; max-width: 14ch; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-project-card p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted); line-height: 1.6; } .ds-project-card a { color: var(--color-ink); font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); text-decoration-thickness: 0.08em; text-underline-offset: 0.2em; } .ds-project-card a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-project-card-topline { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; align-items: center; color: var(--color-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; } .ds-status { border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-accent-soft); color: var(--color-accent-ink); padding: 0.3rem 0.55rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold); } .ds-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-tags span { border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-ink); padding: 0.42rem 0.65rem; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); }

components.name: Compact Navigation
components.description: Sticky portfolio navigation with quiet labels and a compact ER mark.
components.html: EREdgar RicoPerfilHabilidadesProyectos
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; min-height: 4rem; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-line); background: var(--color-bg); font-family: var(--font-body); } .ds-nav a { border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem; color: var(--color-muted); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium); text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav a:hover { background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-ink); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-ink) !important; font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold) !important; } .ds-brand span { display: grid; width: 2.2rem; height: 2.2rem; place-items: center; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-accent-soft); color: var(--color-accent-ink); font-size: 0.84rem; }

narrative.overview: The system should feel like a carefully prepared engineering notebook: plain enough to read under review pressure, specific enough to show judgment, and structured enough to connect claims with project evidence. It is a brand surface, but the brand is credibility through practice rather than decorative personality.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral white and cool-gray surfaces with a honey amber accent used sparingly.
Large but bounded headings, readable body copy, and generous section rhythm.
Flat surfaces at rest, clear borders, and no decorative shadow system.
Cards only for distinct project evidence; other content uses spacing, dividers, and layout.
Semantic, static Astro-first implementation with visible focus and reduced-motion support.

rules.name: The Amber Ration Rule
rules.body: Amber is limited to emphasis and action. If amber covers more than a small fraction of a section, the page is becoming a theme instead of a portfolio.

rules.name: The No Beige Rule
rules.body: Do not translate warmth into cream, sand, or parchment backgrounds. Warmth belongs in the accent and the evidence copy, not the canvas.

rules.name: The Review-Speed Rule
rules.body: Type must support a two-minute scan by a recruiter or technical reviewer. If hierarchy depends on decorative effects, it fails.

rules.name: The Flat Evidence Rule
rules.body: Do not add soft card shadows or glass effects to make content feel premium. Evidence should feel stable, not floating.

dos: Do keep the page full-width with readable inner content widths around 72rem.
Do use amber as a restrained accent for status, focus, emphasis, and the resume CTA.
Do use cards selectively for featured projects where grouping and action are useful.
Do keep keyboard focus visible with the amber 3px outline.
Do respect reduced motion and keep motion limited to state feedback.
Do connect visual sections to evidence: development, requirements, database design, UX/UI, and quality practices.
donts: Don't create a generic centered developer portfolio template.
Don't use purple gradients, glassmorphism, decorative technology cliches, or oversized hero gimmicks.
Don't wrap the entire website inside one boxed container.
Don't turn every section into an identical card grid.
Don't use vague self-promotion where concrete project evidence can carry the claim.
Don't hide real project evidence behind decorative visuals.
